name: sigil-notary
description: Tamper-evident, hash-chained audit trails for AI agents with Ed25519 signatures

tools.name: attest_action
tools.description: Record an action and get a signed, hash-chained receipt

action_type.description: Category of action (e.g. tool_call, file_write, api_request, decision)

payload.description: Optional structured data about the action

tools.name: verify_receipt
tools.description: Verify a receipt's signature and chain integrity

receipt_id.description: UUID of the receipt to verify

tools.name: get_chain
tools.description: Retrieve the audit trail for this agent

limit.description: Maximum number of receipts to return (default 100, max 1000)

after_seq.description: Return receipts after this sequence number (pagination)
